free_text: bombardment of silicon up to 60 MeV: role of level
2 natural silicon foils. 9.78 mg/cm2 sample used for
deuteron and most proton data. 0.320 mg/cm2 sample
used for alpha-particle data and lowest proton
consisted of either a thin-window low-pressure gas
proportional counter for alpha detection, or a thin
consisted of silicon surface barrier E detectors. 3rd
element consisted of CsI(Tl) detectors for higher
Neutron flux was measured with a fission
. particles not stopped in silicon detector,
. ejectile flight time from sample to detector.

include data points above the highest possible
